form.formComment: Racing well recently. Returns from a 50-day let-up. Most recently 3rd of 12 at this track on February 22 over 1300m, on heavy track; 7 len behind Melodia De Cores carrying 57kg at $3.40. The run before that 4th of 9 at this track on January 11 over 1400m, 6 len behind Outcast with 57kg at $3. Chance with the aid of an inside draw.

form.formComment: Comes off a 36 day let-up. Most recently 9th of 11 at this track on March 8 over 2000m, 15 len behind Spartan carrying 56kg at $20.30. The race before that didn't finish the race at this track January 11 over 2000m. Should be right in the finish.

form.formComment: Third race start. First start 8th of 10 at this track on July 27 over 1500m, on a wet track; 11 len behind Only Believe carrying 57kg at $30.40. form.formComment: Second run back. Comes off a 51-day let-up. First-up after seven months won by 6 len at Taruma February 21 over 1200m in heavy going defeating Tank Town with 56kg at $3.90. Previously second-up ran last in a small field at Taruma on July 26 over 1380m, 3 len behind Veil with 55kg at $5.60. Sure to go well again. Improver with winning prospects.
